title: feat(template): add Slack coding agent template

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: add slack agent template
similarOrDuplicatePRs.note: Earlier basic Slack agent template, not a duplicate — this PR adds a more advanced coding agent variant with E2B sandboxes

summary: Adds a new standalone template (templates/template-slack-coding-agent) that wires MastraCode harness + E2B cloud sandboxes into a Slack bot. Each Slack thread gets its own isolated E2B sandbox with the repo pre-cloned. Features include: Slack event handler with signature verification, E2BFilesystem extending MastraFilesystem for file tools, harness streaming to Slack with live status updates, interactive prompt bridging (ask_user/plan approvals posted to Slack), and thread history injection. Includes integration tests, E2E test stubs, Dockerfile, Railway config, and comprehensive README.
maintainerNotes: Approved by graysonhicks. CI is failing on 'Full Test Suite' and 'Lint' checks — mergeableState is BLOCKED. CodeRabbit left several actionable suggestions: extract hardcoded GH CLI version to a constant, fix spinner interval leak on postMessage failure, add retry/backoff guard for gist syncing, deduplicate truncate function, extract duplicated onAskQuestion/onPlanApproval callbacks into factories, conditionally prepend SESSION_CONTEXT only for new sessions, and fix conflicting tsconfig noEmit+outDir. No changeset was included — template-only changes may not require one but worth confirming. All 23 files are new additions under templates/ so no risk to existing packages.
